pages.notes: Page is essentially blank. A few faint partial blue marks in the left margin (possibly stray ink or bleed-through) that do not form readable text.

pages.full_text:
***** campsite good enough to plan a holiday aroun[d]
**** campsite worth going out of our way to visit
*** good campsite
** Not special but fairly good site
* Satisfactory
-x below average not really worth visiting
-XX only go to if no others are available
-XXX Bad site
-XXXX A campsite to go out of your way not to visit
-XXXXX A despicable site to avoid at all costs.
pages.notes: This page is a campsite rating key/legend, written in pencil, explaining the star and minus-X rating system used throughout the diary. No dates, places, or page numbers are present. The last line ends with a double equals sign (==) drawn beneath it. The word at the end of the first line is cut off at the page edge — 'aroun[d]' is the most likely reading.
